Bus Timings

Bus 34 Schedule Qasr Al Watan to Abu Dhabi Courts

June 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 34 in Abu Dhabi provides a vital connection between Qasr Al Watan and Abu Dhabi Courts, serving both residents and visitors with reliable transportation. This bus route passes through some of Abu Dhabi’s prominent landmarks, making it a convenient option for both daily commuters and tourists.

Route Name 34
Route Description Qasr Al Watan - Abu Dhabi Courts
Total Distance Approximately 18 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 10 minutes
Operational Hours 05:45 to 00:07 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3.50
Official Website AD Mobility

Download PDF Bus 34

Bus 34 Route in Abu Dhabi

Bus Timings

Bus 34 operates with a consistent schedule, ensuring frequent service throughout the day. Here are the departure times:

From Qasr Al Watan From Abu Dhabi Courts
06:04 05:45
06:34 06:12
07:03 06:42
07:32 07:07

00:07  

Bus 34 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can head over to the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for 34 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 34 in Abu Dhabi is in line with the standard public transportation rates. Passengers can expect to pay approximately AED 3.50 per trip using a Hafilat card, which is widely used across the city’s bus network. The affordability of this route makes it an attractive option for both daily commutes and occasional trips. This cost-effective pricing ensures that traveling across Abu Dhabi remains budget-friendly for everyone.

Bus Booking

While Bus 34 operates on a first-come, first-served basis, passengers can plan their journey using the Darb app, which provides real-time updates on bus locations and arrival times. Additionally, the Hafilat card can be topped up online, ensuring a seamless and hassle-free travel experience.

Bus Route

Bus 34 covers a comprehensive route, starting from Qasr Al Watan and ending at Abu Dhabi Courts.

  1. Qasr Al Watan

  2. Etihad Towers

  3. Emirates Palace Hotel

  4. Al Marsa Street

  5. Marina Mall

  6. Nation Towers

  7. Federal National Council

  8. Family Beach

  9. Al Bateen Street

  10. Abu Dhabi — Commercial International Bank

  11. Abu Dhabi — Public Beach Main Entrance

  12. Mubarak Bin Mohammed Street

  13. Zayed The First Street

  14. Al Hosn Plaza

  15. Khalid Bin Al Waleed Street

  16. Al Hisn Street

  17. Al Saj’ah Street

  18. Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre

  19. Gold Center

  20. Central Post Office

  21. Al Falah Street

  22. Mariam Bint Said Mosque

  23. Hazaa Bin Zayed Street

  24. Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  25. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street

  1. EIBFS

  4. Shakhbout Bin Sultan Street

  5. Dihan Street

  6. Al Sad Street

  7. Masjid Hamza Bin Abdul Mutalib

  8. Masjid Othman Bin Affan

  9. Sheikh Hamdan Bin Tahnoon Mosque

  10. Al Dhafra Street

  11. Police College

  12. Local Affairs Depatment

  13. Rabdan Street

  14. Al Zafaranah Health Centre

  15. Dhafeer Street

  16. Al Reehan Public Garden

  17. General Civil Aviation Authority

  18. Retirement Pensions and Benefits Fund

  19. Abu Dhabi Courts

Bus 34 Station Overview

Qasr Al Watan

The station provides convenient access to the palace grounds and other nearby attractions. With its strategic location, it is a preferred stop for those looking to delve into the cultural and historical aspects of the city.

Abu Dhabi Courts

Located near the Abu Dhabi Judicial Department, the Abu Dhabi Courts bus station is a crucial stop for legal professionals, government employees, and individuals involved in legal matters. The station is well-connected to key areas of the city, making it easily accessible for daily commuters. Its proximity to the courts and other governmental offices underscores its importance as a transit hub for those engaged in legal and administrative activities. Modern amenities and clear signage ensure a smooth commuting experience for passengers.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 34 in Abu Dhabi passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations:

  1. Qasr Al Watan: This majestic palace and cultural landmark offers insights into the UAE’s heritage and governance.

  2. Etihad Towers: An iconic skyscraper complex known for its luxury accommodations and panoramic views of the city.

3.

  1. Marina Mall: A popular shopping destination featuring a variety of retail stores, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  2. Family Beach: A well-loved beach offering recreational activities and beautiful views.

6.

  1. Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre: A major shopping hub with a wide range of stores and dining choices.

  2. Gold Center: A popular destination for gold jewelry shopping.

9.

These stops make Bus 34 a convenient choice for exploring key attractions in Abu Dhabi.

Journey Experience

As you make your way through the city, you’ll experience a mix of modern urban life and historic landmarks, providing glimpses of Abu Dhabi’s diverse appeal. By the time you reach Abu Dhabi Courts, you’ve witnessed both the city’s cultural richness and its modern administrative hubs.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can easily reach Abu Dhabi Courts, the furthest destination on the Bus 34 route starting from Qasr Al Watan. The ride is convenient and offers a price range of AED 46-55. With real-time updates and straightforward booking, Careem ensures a hassle-free experience. Whether you’re heading for legal matters or visiting the area, Careem provides a reliable transportation option to complete your journey comfortably.

With frequent service, affordable fares, and real-time tracking via the Darb app, it caters to both commuters and tourists. Whether for work or leisure, Bus 34 is a great choice for exploring the city. Enjoy a seamless journey with excellent connectivity throughout Abu Dhabi.

Official UAE Sources

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
